transcript:
Speaker A (AI): काल कुठे गेला होतास? [Where did you go yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday. 
Speaker A (AI): माल? प्रणाउन्सिएशन थोडं चुकलं. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. काल काय खाल्लस? [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit wrong. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] 
Speaker B (Human): I eat पीजा खाल्ला. [I eat pizza.] 
Speaker A (AI): पीजा? नाही, Pizza. आणि गोष्ट कालची आहे म्हणून Eat नाही, Ate. I ate pizza. ट्रेन कुठून पकडतोस? [Pizza? No, Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not Eat, Ate. I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] 
Speaker B (Human): I pick train from railway ईस्टेशन. [I pick train from railway station.] 
Speaker A (AI): Pick? Pick म्हणजे उचलणं. ट्रेन उचलणार का? Catch म्हणजे पकडणं. आणि ईस्टेशन नाही, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not estation, Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] 
Speaker B (Human): Ohhh माझं प्रणाउन्सिएशन वीक आहे. [Ohhh my pronunciation is weak.] 
Speaker A (AI): काही हरकत नाही. AI टीचर ट्राय केलं का? [No problem. Did you try AI teacher?] 
Speaker B (Human): तो महाग असेल ना? [It must be expensive, right?] 
Speaker A (AI): अजिबात नाही. नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेसपेक्षा सातपट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून ५० लाख लोक MySivi वर प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] 
Speaker B (Human): पण टाईम मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] 
Speaker A (AI): रोज फक्त १५ ते २० मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस पुरेशी आहे. हळूहळू कॉन्फिडेंट होशील. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will slowly become confident.] 
Speaker B (Human): वाव, कसं जॉईन करू? [Wow, how do I join?] 
Speaker A (AI): खाली इन्स्टॉल बटनावर क्लिक कर. MySivi App इन्स्टॉल कर, साईन अप कर आणि प्रॅक्टिस सुरू कर. फक्त १५ दिवसात इम्प्रूव्हमेंट दिसायला लागेल. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयांमध्ये ३ दिवसांसाठी आहे. आत्ताच सुरू कर. [Click on the install button below. Install MySivi App, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Trial is for 3 days at just 1 rupee. Start now.] 
Speaker C (Voiceover): Install Now वरती क्लिक करा आणि MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड करा. [Click on Install Now and download MySivi app.]

पीजा नाही [Not pizza]
Pizza आणि गोष्ट कालची आहे म्हणून Eat नाही Ate [Pizza, and since it's about yesterday, not Eat, Ate]
I ate pizza

I pick train from railway ईस्टेशन [I pick train from railway station]
Pick म्हणजे उचलणं. ट्रेन उचलणार का? [Pick means to lift. Will you lift the train?]

Station
I catch the train from the railway station
ohhh माझं प्रणाउन्सिएशन वीक आहे [ohhh my pronunciation is weak]

summary: The ad features a split-screen conversation in Marathi where an AI avatar corrects a young man's English grammar and pronunciation errors. The AI then pitches the MySivi app as an affordable, convenient solution for daily practice, offering a 3-day trial for just 1 rupee. The video ends with a call to action to install the app.
